allow: Bash(Rscript -e 'library\(readr\); d <- read_csv\(""VL2 - Sheet1.csv"", show_col_types=FALSE\); ages <- d[[""Età""]]; bad <- ages[!is.na\(ages\) & ages > 100]; cat\(""Values > 100:\\n""\); print\(sort\(bad\)\)')

Bash(Rscript -e "library\(readr\); d <- read_csv\(''VL2 - Sheet1.csv'', show_col_types=FALSE\); ages <- d[[""Età""]]; bad <- ages[!is.na\(ages\) & ages > 100]; cat\(''Values above 100:\\n''\); print\(sort\(bad\)\)")
Bash(Rscript -e "library\(readr\); d <- read_csv\(''VL2 - Sheet1.csv'', show_col_types=FALSE\); ages <- na.omit\(d[[18]]\); print\(sort\(ages[ages > 100]\)\)")
Bash(Rscript -e "library\(readr\); d <- read_csv\(''VL2 - Sheet1.csv'', show_col_types=FALSE\); for\(i in 1:38\) cat\(i, names\(d\)[i], ''\\n''\)")
Bash(Rscript -e "library\(readr\); d <- read_csv\(''VL2 - Sheet1.csv'', show_col_types=FALSE\); ages <- na.omit\(d[[19]]\); print\(sort\(ages[ages > 100]\)\)")
Bash(Rscript -e "library\(readr\); d <- read_csv\(''VL2 - Sheet1.csv'', show_col_types=FALSE\); ages <- na.omit\(d[[19]]\); print\(summary\(ages\)\); cat\(''\\n0 values:'', sum\(ages == 0\)\)")

Bash(Rscript -e "library\(readr\); d <- read_csv\(''VL2 - Sheet1.csv'', show_col_types=FALSE\); caps <- na.omit\(d[[30]]\); tab <- sort\(table\(caps\), decreasing=TRUE\); print\(head\(tab, 30\)\); cat\(''\\nUnique CAPs:'', length\(unique\(caps\)\), ''\\nNA count:'', sum\(is.na\(d[[30]]\)\)\)")

Bash(Rscript -e "library\(readr\); d <- read_csv\(''VL2 - Sheet1.csv'', show_col_types=FALSE\); caps <- na.omit\(d[[30]]\); non_milan <- caps[caps < 20100 | caps > 20200]; cat\(''Non-Milan range CAPs:\\n''\); print\(sort\(table\(non_milan\), decreasing=TRUE\)\)")

Bash(Rscript -e "library\(readr\); d <- read_csv\(''VL2 - Sheet1.csv'', show_col_types=FALSE\); vars <- c\(8:14, 15:17, 18:19, 20, 21:27, 29, 30\); for\(i in vars\) cat\(sprintf\(''%2d %-45s NA=%d\\n'', i, names\(d\)[i], sum\(is.na\(d[[i]]\)\)\)\)")
Bash(Rscript -e "library\(readr\); d <- read_csv\(''VL2 - Sheet1.csv'', show_col_types=FALSE\); for\(i in 8:14\) { cat\(names\(d\)[i], '': ''\); print\(table\(d[[i]], useNA=''ifany''\)\) }")
Bash(Rscript -e "library\(readr\); d <- read_csv\(''VL2 - Sheet1.csv'', show_col_types=FALSE\); for\(i in 21:27\) { cat\(names\(d\)[i], '': ''\); print\(table\(d[[i]], useNA=''ifany''\)\) }")
Bash(Rscript -e "library\(readr\); d <- read_csv\(''VL2 - Sheet1.csv'', show_col_types=FALSE\); print\(table\(d[[28]], useNA=''ifany''\)\)")

Bash(Rscript -e "library\(readr\); d <- read_csv\(''VL2 - Sheet1.csv'', show_col_types=FALSE\); levs <- union\(union\(unique\(d[[15]]\), unique\(d[[16]]\)\), unique\(d[[17]]\)\); levs <- levs[complete.cases\(levs\)]; cat\(''All priority choice levels:\\n''\); for\(l in sort\(levs\)\) cat\(''  '', l, ''\\n''\)")

Bash(Rscript -e "library\(readr\); d <- read_csv\(''VL2 - Sheet1.csv'', show_col_types=FALSE\); cat\(''Rows with complete data across all clustering vars:\\n''\); vars <- c\(8:14, 15:17, 18:20, 21:27, 29, 30\); complete <- complete.cases\(d[,vars]\); cat\(''Complete:'', sum\(complete\), ''out of'', nrow\(d\), ''\\n''\); vars2 <- c\(8:14, 15:17, 18:20, 21:27, 29\); complete2 <- complete.cases\(d[,vars2]\); cat\(''Complete excl CAP:'', sum\(complete2\), ''out of'', nrow\(d\), ''\\n''\)")
